title: M.Sc (Yoga Therapy)
content: M.Sc (Yoga Therapy) Department of Allied and Health Sciences Programme Level Post Graduate Duration 2 Years Eligibility Fee Structure About the Programme Eligibility Graduation from any recognized university with minimum 50% marks Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit.
